description: Cross-platform release artifacts for xmlui-desktop: matrix CI build, single-file binary (app/ embedded), install scripts, and a /releases page that mirrors xmlui.org/get-started's shape.

items.before: No CI; releases are produced manually from a local Mac
items.after: Workflow modeled on ~/xmlui-cli's: workflow_dispatch with `tag` input, four-target matrix (linux-amd64 ubuntu-latest, macos-arm64 macos-latest, macos-intel macos-13, windows-amd64 windows-latest). Each job: rust-toolchain stable, Swatinem/rust-cache for src-tauri, apt install of webkit2gtk + friends on Linux, `cargo build` (debug — the shipping format) in src-tauri/, copy the binary out, tar.gz on Unix / zip on Windows, attach to the release. `publish-checksums` job downloads artifacts, generates SHA256SUMS, attaches it plus install.sh + install.ps1. Note: publish-checksums depends on install.sh + install.ps1 existing at repo root; trigger the workflow only after install-scripts has merged.

items.before: Uncommitted: in-app /releases route (NavLink + Page + Releases.xmlui). build.yml's publish-checksums had no `body:`.
items.after: Reverted /releases NavLink + Page from app/tools/Main.xmlui, deleted app/tools/components/Releases.xmlui. Added a Markdown `body:` to the publish-checksums upload step in .github/workflows/build.yml: platform-tabbed install one-liners (macOS/Linux + Windows), audit-friendly manual install, troubleshooting (PATH, Gatekeeper, update, uninstall). Visible on every GitHub release page before any install.
